title: University international office
description: Ask about immigration support, arrival services, introduction week, and institution-specific requirements.

title: University housing office
description: Ask whether your institution has reserved rooms, approved partners, warning lists, or emergency housing advice.

title: Your municipality
description: Ask about BRP registration, accepted documents, correspondence address options, and appointment availability.

title: IND
description: Ask about MVV, residence permits, collection letters, biometrics, and residence-card status.

title: DigiD helpdesk
description: Ask about applying, activating, receiving activation letters, and account access problems.

title: Health insurer or insurance adviser
description: Ask which insurance applies to your study, work, internship, or EHIC situation before buying coverage.

title: Nearby GP practice
description: Ask whether the practice accepts new patients in your postcode and how registration works.

title: Student services
description: Ask about arrival help, wellbeing support, study advisers, emergency contacts, and practical campus services.

title: Public transport operator or 9292
description: Ask about route planning, payment options, disruptions, accessibility, and local transport subscriptions.

title: Telecom provider
description: Ask about prepaid SIMs, subscriptions, number portability, EU roaming, eSIM support, and contract terms.

title: Bank or payment provider
description: Ask which documents are needed for an account and whether you can start before receiving your BSN.
